expectations.text: Output contains all 6 rounds (Round 1 through Round 6)
expectations.evidence: No round-based debate structure. Output is a pros/cons analysis with a recommendation section.

expectations.text: Optimizer, Frontline Operator, and COO personas all appear and are distinct
expectations.evidence: No persona-based structure. Single-voice analysis throughout.

expectations.text: Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
expectations.evidence: No Round 2 or severity ratings. Risks listed at end without severity classification.

expectations.text: Round 4 references specific mitigations from Round 3, not just repeating Round 2
Round 6 contains one of the 5 valid recommendations
expectations.evidence: Recommendation is 'phased hybrid approach' — not one of the 5 valid options (approve/approve-with-conditions/pilot-first/defer/reject).

expectations.text: A CEO Summary section exists that is standalone and uses business language
expectations.evidence: No CEO Summary section. Has a 'Recommendation' section but not formatted as a standalone CEO brief.

expectations.text: Metrics table present with all 8 metrics filled in
People impact summary with headcount changes, roles affected, transition support, attrition risk
expectations.evidence: Brief mention of morale risk but no structured people impact summary.

expectations.text: Round 5 includes fallback plans for surviving challenges
